data.title: Trail Runner Pro
data.description: Built for rugged terrain with reinforced toe caps and aggressive tread patterns. Waterproof and durable.

data.title: Road Racer Elite
data.description: Ultra-lightweight racing flat designed for speed. Carbon fiber plate for maximum energy return.

data.title: Daily Comfort 500
data.description: Responsive cushioning for everyday training. Breathable mesh upper with supportive heel counter.

data.title: Hiking Explorer
data.description: All-terrain hiking boot with ankle support and Vibram outsole. Perfect for mountain trails.

data.title: Sprint Master
data.description: Track and field sprint spike for competitive athletes. Ultra-light with 6-pin spike plate.

data.title: Casual Walker
data.description: Everyday walking shoe with memory foam insole. Classic style meets all-day comfort.
